title: Qutekcak Youth Coalition Meeting – 6/23/21
summary: Meet at Qutekcak Native Tribe on June 23rd at 5 pm for presentation and fishing at First Lake. You can grab yourself a new fishing pole after presentation. The post Qutekcak Youth Coalition Meeting – 6/23/21 first appeared on Chugachmiut .

title: Gulkana Village Historical Video
summary: This video was produced in partnership between Gulkana Village Council and Ahtna, Incorporated. After almost 50 years, the Gulkana Village Council has reached a resolution with the State of Alaska on the return of their former village lands and traditional burial grounds. title: The Salmon Way: An Alaska State of Mind
summary: Alaska Wilderness League was honored to conclude our second season of our Geography of Hope series talking Tongass National Forest with our great friend, Amy Gulick. title: June Update from the Alaska SBDC Executive Director
summary: June is here and for Alaskans, that means sunshine, salmon, and outdoor activities until you drop! I hope that all of you are able to get out and enjoy all the things that make living in Alaska so great this summer. When you do, don’t be surprised to see more tourists than you expected!
